About the Company

Palantir Technologies offers a suite of software applications for integrating, visualizing, and analyzing information. Palantir software allows analysts within and between government organizations to collaborate and analyze large quantities of data. The company's software platforms are designed to help organizations, particularly in the fields

## **Notable Events**

Legal Proceeding

A US judge ruled that three former employees of Palantir Technologies likely violated confidentiality and non-solicitation agreements when they founded Percepta, but declined to issue an order halting their work at the new company.

Feb 18, 2026

lorem ipsum  
**Unlock the complete set of predictions on funding, acquisitions, IPOs, and more**   
Palantir Technologies is researching and developing systems for structuring, storing, and displaying time series data in user interfaces, efficient inter-application communications, synchronizing dataset updates, AI-assisted data evaluations, interactive user interfaces for location-based data analysis, pipeline task verification, low-latency database systems, data propagation and mapping, object-centric data analysis, and monitoring and alerting mechanisms. These efforts span data integration, analytics, and secure, scalable data management.

## **Products and Services**

This information is generated using AI and may include errors or omissions.

[Learn more.](https://about.crunchbase.com/terms-of-service/)

| Product Name  | Product Description  |
| ----- | ----- |
| Palantir Foundry | A data integration and analytics platform that enables organizations to centralize, manage, and analyze large datasets for operational decision-making. |
| Palantir Gotham | A data analytics platform focused on integrating, managing, and analyzing complex data for intelligence, defense, and law enforcement applications. |
| Apollo | A continuous delivery and infrastructure management platform that automates software deployment and operations across various environments. |

## **Highlights**

[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) is registered under the ticker 

[NASDAQ:PLTR](https://www.google.com/finance?q=NASDAQ:PLTR)

. Their stock opened with $7.25 in its Sep 30, 2020 IPO.[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has raised a total of [$3B](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organizations/funding_total/palantir-technologies) in funding over [28](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organizations/num_funding_rounds/palantir-technologies) rounds. Their latest funding was raised on [Aug 31, 2023](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organizations/last_funding_at/palantir-technologies) from a [Post-IPO Equity](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organizations/last_funding_type/palantir-technologies) round.[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has made [14](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organizations/num_investments/palantir-technologies) investments. Their most recent investment was on Jan 14, 2026, when [Etched.ai](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/etched-ai) raised $500M.[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) is funded by [63](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/principal.investors/field/organizations/num_investors/palantir-technologies) investors. [ARK Investment Management](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/ark-investment-management) and  [ARK Investment Management](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/ark-investment-management) are the most recent investors.[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has invested in [Palladyne AI](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/sarcos) on Jan 14, 2026\. This investment \- [Post-IPO Equity \- Palladyne AI](https://www.crunchbase.com/funding_round/sarcos-post-ipo-equity--85a67918) \- was valued at $500M.[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has had [10](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/organizations/field/organizations/num_exits/palantir-technologies) exits. [Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies)'s most notable exits include [Rigetti Computing](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/rigetti-computing), [Energy Vault](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/energy-vault-sa), and  [Palladyne AI](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/sarcos).[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has acquired [7](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/acquisitions/field/organizations/num_acquisitions/palantir-technologies) organizations. Their most recent acquisition was [Synapse Technology Corporation](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/synapse-technology-corporation) on Jan 1, 2020\.

[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies)'s most notable exits include [Rigetti Computing](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/rigetti-computing), [Energy Vault](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/energy-vault-sa), and  [Palladyne AI](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/sarcos).

Which industries has this organization had the most exits in?

![Rigetti Computing Logo][image112]

[Rigetti Computing](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/rigetti-computing)Rigetti Computing is a quantum computing company that builds and deploys full-stack quantum systems with superconducting qubits.

![Energy Vault Logo][image113]

[Energy Vault](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/energy-vault-sa)Energy Vault offers a utility-scale, gravity-based storage solution for renewable energy.

![Palladyne AI Logo][image114]

[Palladyne AI](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/sarcos)Palladyne AI robotics company that specializes in developing wearable and teleoperated industrial robotics.

![Roivant Sciences Logo][image115]

[Roivant Sciences](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/roivant-sciences)Roivant Sciences is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the development of medicines and healthcare technologies to patients.

![Babylon Logo][image116]

[Babylon](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/babylon-health)Babylon aims to provide accessible, affordable healthcare by combining AI with doctors.

![Rubicon Logo][image117]

[Rubicon](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/rubicon-technologies)Rubicon is a software platform that provides waste management, recycling, and smart city technology solutions.

![AdTheorent Logo][image118]

[AdTheorent](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/adtheorent)AdTheorent’s is a machine learning technology powers predictive targeting, predictive creative, and self-learning insights.

![Wejo Logo][image119]

[Wejo](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/wejo)Wejo is a data, analytics, and software service company that analyzes connected and electric vehicle data.

![Fast Radius Logo][image120]

[Fast Radius](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/fast-radius-inc)Fast Radius, Inc. is a cloud manufacturing and digital supply chain company.

![Tritium Logo][image121]

[Tritium](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/tritium)Tritium designs and manufactures proprietary hardware and software to create DC fast chargers for electric vehicles.

Palantir Technologies is a software company that develops data analytics and data integration software solutions.  
Founded May 9, 2003Public[Post-IPO Equity](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/funding_rounds/field/organization/last_funding_type/palantir-technologies)[Denver](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/organizations/field/organization/location_identifiers/denver-colorado-b063), [Colorado](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/organizations/field/organization/location_identifiers/colorado-united-states), [United States](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/organizations/field/organization/location_identifiers/united-states)[1001-5000](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/people/field/organization/num_employees_enum/palantir-technologies)

## Profiles & Contacts

## **Highlights**

[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has [60](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/jobs/field/organizations/num_current_positions/palantir-technologies) current employee profiles, including CEO, Co-Founder & Director [Alexander Karp](https://www.crunchbase.com/person/alexander-karp).[Palantir Technologies](https://www.crunchbase.com/organization/palantir-technologies) has [7](https://www.crunchbase.com/search/jobs/field/organizations/num_current_advisor_positions/palantir-technologies) board members and advisors, including [Peter Thiel](https://www.crunchbase.com/person/peter-thiel).
